fields.acceptance_criteria: viewer-ctl exposes an uninstall/remove command for managed viewers and viewer-ctl itself, removes installed binaries/static assets safely, and the install contract plus Docker validation cover the supported deinstall flow.
fields.title: [viewer-ctl] Implement uninstall command for managed viewers
fields.validation_plan: Add contract assertions plus Docker-based install/deinstall validation for the supported viewer uninstall flow.
